title: taraxacum stenoceras
intro: Taraxacum stenoceras, also known as the narrow-leaved dandelion, is a perennial plant species belonging to the sunflower family (Asteraceae). The plant has been utilized in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and diuretic effects. The health benefits of Taraxacum stenoceras include its ability to support liver and kidney function, lower blood pressure, and aid in digestion. Taraxacum stenoceras is commonly prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and is also used in combination with other herbs in herbal remedies.
